'''√ng-y-v''' ('''ngayava''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:landfill|landfill]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-y-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:landfill|landfill]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √ng-y-v
|-
! Lemma
| ngayava
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || ngayavithi || ngayaviji || ngayavishi || ngayavi
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || ngayavuthuth || ngayavujuj || ngayavushush || ngayav
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || ngayavuthu || ngayavuju || ngayavushu || ngayavu
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || ngayavufuth || ngayavufuj || ngayavufush || ngayavuf
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || ngayavethe || ngayaveje || ngayaveshe || ngayave
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || ngayavothoth || ngayavojoj || ngayavoshosh || ngayav
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || ngayavotho || ngayavojo || ngayavosho || ngayavo
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || ngayavofoth || ngayavofoj || ngayavofosh || ngayavof
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || ngayavïf || ngayavïf || ngayavïf || ngayavïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || ngayavïfïf || ngayavïfïf || ngayavïfïf || ngayavïfïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || ngayavïf || ngayavïf || ngayavïf || ngayavïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || ngayavïf || ngayavïf || ngayavïf || ngayavïf
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || ngayavæthæ || ngayavæjæ || ngayavæshæ || ngayavæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || ngayavathath || ngayavajaj || ngayavashash || ngayav
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || ngayavatha || ngayavaja || ngayavasha || ngayava
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || ngayavafath || ngayavafaj || ngayavafash || ngayavaf
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || ngayavasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || gongayavasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || gokingayavasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || ngayavnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || gongayavnknüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokingayavnüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || ngayavshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gongayavnkshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokingayavshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || ngayavroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || gongayavnkroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokingayavroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || ngayavmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || gongayavnkmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokingayavmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || ngayavsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || gongayavnksherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokingayavsherasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || ngayavngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || gongayavnkngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokingayavngasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || ngayavyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || gongayavnkyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokingayavyaasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || ngayavyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || gongayavnkyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokingayavyamasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || ngayavnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gongayavnknüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokingayavnüshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || ngayavnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gongayavnknüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokingayavnüroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || ngayavnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gongayavnknümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokingayavnümuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || ngayavshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gongayavnkshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokingayavshënüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || ngayavshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gongayavnkshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokingayavshëroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || ngayavshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gongayavnkshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokingayavshëmuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || ngayavronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gongayavnkronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokingayavronüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || ngayavroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gongayavnkroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokingayavroshëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || ngayavromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gongayavnkromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokingayavromuasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || ngayavmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gongayavnkmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokingayavmunüasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || ngayavmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gongayavnkmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokingayavmushëasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || ngayavmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gongayavnkmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokingayavmuroasha
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || ngayav
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || ngæyæv
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || hongayav
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || hongæyæv
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || hohongayav
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || hohongæyæv
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || nüngayav
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || nüngæyæv
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || nününgayav
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nününgæyæv
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || nïngayav
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || nïngæyæv
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïngayav
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || nïnïngæyæv
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || lungayav
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || lungæyæv
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || lulungayav
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lulungæyæv
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || lingayav
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || lingæyæv
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || lilingayav
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || lilingæyæv
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || kongayav
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || kongæyæv
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || kokongayav
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kokongæyæv
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || kengayav
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || kengæyæv
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || kekengayav
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || kekengæyæv
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
